title: Cooperation by other state entities
doc_html:
§31.47.  Cooperation by other state entities

All departments, commissions, boards, agencies, officers, and institutions of the state and all subdivisions thereof shall cooperate with the office in carrying out the purposes of this Part.

Acts 2001, No. 194, §1.
